title: barringtonia obtusangula
intro: Barringtonia obtusangula, also known as the rough-fruited barringtonia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lecythidaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Barringtonia obtusangula include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
